# rnmamod: Bayesian network meta-analysis R package

Official Git repository of `rnmamod` R package

In **R Views** [November 2021: “Top 40” New CRAN
Packages](https://rviews.rstudio.com/2021/12/21/november-2021-top-40-new-cran-packages/)

In **Medium** [Peek-a-boo: Evidence synthesis using the rnmamod R
package](https://medium.com/@spineliloukia26/peek-a-boo-evidence-synthesis-using-the-rnmamod-r-package-fc40f5c100fa)

In the **YouTube channel** of
[ESMARConf2023](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ZfrU3OpEE5A)

## Contributors

[Loukia Spineli](https://orcid.org/0000-0001-9515-582X), [Chrysostomos
Kalyvas](https://orcid.org/0000-0003-0606-4518), [Katerina
Papadimitropoulou](https://orcid.org/0000-0002-5732-4044)

## Website

The [website](https://loukiaspin.github.io/rnmamod/) of `rnmamod`
currently includes two short tutorials (*Description of the network* and
*Perform network meta-analysis*). There is also a structured reference
list to facilitate access to the documentation of the functions
available in the package.

## Description

The `rnmamod` package performs one-stage fixed-effect or random-effects
Bayesian network meta-analysis (NMA) while adjusting for *missing
participant outcome data* (MOD) using the pattern-mixture model. In the
case of two interventions, the package performs one-stage Bayesian
pairwise meta-analysis. Standard aggregate data NMA is a special case of
NMA with MOD, where either all studies or no studies have MOD available,
respectively.

The package handles data inputs in *arm-based format*: - binary data
(effect size: odds ratio, risk ratio, and risk difference)  
- continuous data (effect size: raw and standardised mean differences,
ratio of means).

The `rnmamod` package comprises a suite of all necessary models for
estimation and prediction of the intervention effect, and evaluation of
the consistency assumption locally and globally. Also includes a rich
suite of visualisation tools to aid in interpretation of the results and
preparation of NMA manuscript submission. Missing participant outcome
data are addressed in all models of the package.

## Getting started

Run the following code to install and load the package from CRAN:

``` R
install.packages("rnmamod")
library(rnmamod)
```

or run the following code to install the development version of the
package:

``` R
install.packages("devtools")
devtools::install_github("LoukiaSpin/rnmamod")
```

## Example

[Baker et al. (2009)](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/19637942/)
comprising 21 trials comparing seven pharmacologic interventions with
each other and placebo in chronic obstructive pulmonary disease (COPD)
patients. The exacerbation of COPD (harmful outcome) is the analysed
binary outcome.

``` r

head(nma.baker2009)
#>                 study t1 t2 t3 t4 r1 r2 r3 r4 m1 m2 m3 m4  n1  n2 n3 n4
#> Llewellyn-Jones, 1996  1  4 NA NA  3  0 NA NA  1  0 NA NA   8   8 NA NA
#>        Paggiaro, 1998  1  4 NA NA 51 45 NA NA 27 19 NA NA 139 142 NA NA
#>          Mahler, 1999  1  7 NA NA 47 28 NA NA 23  9 NA NA 143 135 NA NA
#>        Casaburi, 2000  1  8 NA NA 41 45 NA NA 18 12 NA NA 191 279 NA NA
#>       van Noord, 2000  1  7 NA NA 18 11 NA NA  8  7 NA NA  50  47 NA NA
#>         Rennard, 2001  1  7 NA NA 41 38 NA NA 29 22 NA NA 135 132 NA NA
```

### Network plot

Create the network plot using the *netplot* function:

``` r

# The names of the interventions in the order they appear in the dataset
interv_names <- c("placebo", "budesonide", "budesonide plus formoterol", "fluticasone", "fluticasone plus salmeterol", "formoterol", "salmeterol", "tiotropium")

netplot(data = nma.baker2009, drug_names = interv_names, show_multi = TRUE, edge_label_cex = 1)
```

![](reference/figures/Network_Baker.png)

### Perform Bayesian random-effects network meta-analysis

The following code performs a Bayesian random-effects network
meta-analysis under the *missing at random assumption* while using an
intervention-specific informative missingness odds ratio
(`assumption = "IDE-ARM"`) in the logarithmic scale:

``` r

res <- run_model(data = nma.baker2009,
                 measure = "OR",
                 model = "RE",
                 assumption = "IDE-ARM",
                 heter_prior = list("halfnormal", 0, 1),
                 mean_misspar = c(0, 0), 
                 var_misspar = 1,
                 D = 0,
                 n_chains = 3,
                 n_iter = 10000,
                 n_burnin = 1000,
                 n_thin = 1)
```

### League table

Illustrate all possible pairwise comparisons of the interventions using
a league heatmap. Interventions are sorted in decreasing order by their
posterior mean SUCRA (surface under the cumulative ranking) value in the
main diagonal:

``` r

league_heatmap(full1 = res, drug_names1 = interv_names)
```

![](reference/figures/League_Baker.png)  

  

### Rankogram with SUCRA curves

The following code presents the hierarchy of the interventions in the
network using integrated rankograms and SUCRA curves:

``` r

rankosucra_plot(full1 = res, drug_names1 = interv_names)
```

![](reference/figures/Sucra_Baker.png)

## Funding source

The development of the `rnmamod` package was funded by the **German
Research Foundation** (Deutsche Forschungsgemeinschaft) (grant no. [SP
1664/1-3](https://gepris.dfg.de/gepris/projekt/339420617) and [SP
1664/2-1](https://gepris.dfg.de/gepris/projekt/462260733))

![](reference/figures/dfg_logo_schriftzug_blau_foerderung_en.png)

# Package index

## All functions

- [`balloon_plot()`](https://loukiaspin.github.io/rnmamod/reference/balloon_plot.md)
  : Enhanced balloon plot
- [`baseline_model()`](https://loukiaspin.github.io/rnmamod/reference/baseline_model.md)
  : The baseline model for binary outcome
- [`bland_altman_plot()`](https://loukiaspin.github.io/rnmamod/reference/bland_altman_plot.md)
  : The Bland-Altman plot
- [`comp_clustering()`](https://loukiaspin.github.io/rnmamod/reference/comp_clustering.md)
  : End-user-ready results for comparison dissimilarity and hierarchical
  clustering (Comparisons' comparability for transitivity evaluation)
- [`covar_contribution_plot()`](https://loukiaspin.github.io/rnmamod/reference/covar_contribution_plot.md)
  : Visualising study percentage contributions against a covariate
- [`data_preparation()`](https://loukiaspin.github.io/rnmamod/reference/data_preparation.md)
  : Prepare the dataset in the proper format for R2jags
- [`dendro_heatmap()`](https://loukiaspin.github.io/rnmamod/reference/dendro_heatmap.md)
  : Dendrogram with amalgamated heatmap (Comparisons' comparability for
  transitivity evaluation)
- [`describe_network()`](https://loukiaspin.github.io/rnmamod/reference/describe_network.md)
  : A function to describe the evidence base
- [`distr_characteristics()`](https://loukiaspin.github.io/rnmamod/reference/distr_characteristics.md)
  : Visualising the distribution of characteristics (Comparisons'
  comparability for transitivity evaluation)
- [`forestplot()`](https://loukiaspin.github.io/rnmamod/reference/forestplot.md)
  : Comparator-specific forest plot for network meta-analysis
- [`forestplot_juxtapose()`](https://loukiaspin.github.io/rnmamod/reference/forestplot_juxtapose.md)
  : Forest plot of juxtaposing several network meta-analysis models
- [`forestplot_metareg()`](https://loukiaspin.github.io/rnmamod/reference/forestplot_metareg.md)
  : Comparator-specific forest plot for network meta-regression
- [`gower_distance()`](https://loukiaspin.github.io/rnmamod/reference/gower_distance.md)
  : Weighted Gower's dissimilarity measure (Trials' comparability for
  transitivity evaluation)
- [`heatmap_missing_dataset()`](https://loukiaspin.github.io/rnmamod/reference/heatmap_missing_dataset.md)
  : Heatmap of proportion of missing participants in the dataset
- [`heatmap_missing_network()`](https://loukiaspin.github.io/rnmamod/reference/heatmap_missing_network.md)
  : Heatmap of proportion of missing participants in the network
- [`heatmap_robustness()`](https://loukiaspin.github.io/rnmamod/reference/heatmap_robustness.md)
  : Heatmap of robustness
- [`heter_density_plot()`](https://loukiaspin.github.io/rnmamod/reference/heter_density_plot.md)
  : Visualising the density of two prior distributions for the
  heterogeneity parameter
- [`heterogeneity_param_prior()`](https://loukiaspin.github.io/rnmamod/reference/heterogeneity_param_prior.md)
  : Determine the prior distribution for the heterogeneity parameter
- [`improved_ume()`](https://loukiaspin.github.io/rnmamod/reference/improved_ume.md)
  : Detect the frail comparisons in multi-arm trials
- [`inconsistency_variance_prior()`](https://loukiaspin.github.io/rnmamod/reference/inconsistency_variance_prior.md)
  : Function for the hyper-parameters of the prior distribution of the
  inconsistency variance (network meta-analysis with random
  inconsistency effects)
- [`internal_measures_plot()`](https://loukiaspin.github.io/rnmamod/reference/internal_measures_plot.md)
  : Internal measures for cluster validation (Comparisons' comparability
  for transitivity evaluation)
- [`intervalplot_panel_ume()`](https://loukiaspin.github.io/rnmamod/reference/intervalplot_panel_ume.md)
  : A panel of interval plots for the unrelated mean effects model
- [`kld_barplot()`](https://loukiaspin.github.io/rnmamod/reference/kld_barplot.md)
  : Barplot for the Kullback-Leibler divergence measure (missingness
  scenarios)
- [`kld_inconsistency()`](https://loukiaspin.github.io/rnmamod/reference/kld_inconsistency.md)
  : Density plots of local inconsistency results and Kullback-Leibler
  divergence when 'rnmamod', 'netmeta' or 'gemtc' R packages are used
- [`kld_inconsistency_user()`](https://loukiaspin.github.io/rnmamod/reference/kld_inconsistency_user.md)
  : Density plots of local inconsistency results and Kullback-Leibler
  divergence (When dataset is created by the user)
- [`kld_measure()`](https://loukiaspin.github.io/rnmamod/reference/kld_measure.md)
  : Function for the Kullback-Leibler Divergence of two normally
  distributed treatment effects for the same pairwise comparison
- [`league_heatmap()`](https://loukiaspin.github.io/rnmamod/reference/league_heatmap.md)
  : League heatmap for estimation
- [`league_heatmap_pred()`](https://loukiaspin.github.io/rnmamod/reference/league_heatmap_pred.md)
  : League heatmap for prediction
- [`league_table_absolute()`](https://loukiaspin.github.io/rnmamod/reference/league_table_absolute.md)
  : League table for relative and absolute effects
- [`league_table_absolute_user()`](https://loukiaspin.github.io/rnmamod/reference/league_table_absolute_user.md)
  : League table for relative and absolute effects (user defined)
- [`leverage_plot()`](https://loukiaspin.github.io/rnmamod/reference/leverage_plot.md)
  : Leverage plot
- [`mcmc_diagnostics()`](https://loukiaspin.github.io/rnmamod/reference/mcmc_diagnostics.md)
  : Markov Chain Monte Carlo diagnostics
- [`metareg_plot()`](https://loukiaspin.github.io/rnmamod/reference/metareg_plot.md)
  : End-user-ready results for network meta-regression
- [`miss_characteristics()`](https://loukiaspin.github.io/rnmamod/reference/miss_characteristics.md)
  : Visualising missing data in characteristics (Comparisons'
  comparability for transitivity evaluation)
- [`missingness_param_prior()`](https://loukiaspin.github.io/rnmamod/reference/missingness_param_prior.md)
  : Define the mean value of the normal distribution of the missingness
  parameter
- [`netplot()`](https://loukiaspin.github.io/rnmamod/reference/netplot.md)
  : Network plot
- [`nma.baker2009`](https://loukiaspin.github.io/rnmamod/reference/nma.baker2009.md)
  : Pharmacological interventions for chronic obstructive pulmonary
  disease
- [`nma.bottomley2011`](https://loukiaspin.github.io/rnmamod/reference/nma.bottomley2011.md)
  : Pharmacological interventions for moderately severe scalp psoriasis
- [`nma.dogliotti2014`](https://loukiaspin.github.io/rnmamod/reference/nma.dogliotti2014.md)
  : Oral antithrombotics for stroke episode
- [`nma.fluoride.donegan2018`](https://loukiaspin.github.io/rnmamod/reference/nma.fluoride.donegan2018.md)
  : Topical fluoride interventions for preventing dental caries
- [`nma.liu2013`](https://loukiaspin.github.io/rnmamod/reference/nma.liu2013.md)
  : Antidepressants in Parkinson's disease
- [`nma.malaria.donegan2018`](https://loukiaspin.github.io/rnmamod/reference/nma.malaria.donegan2018.md)
  : Artemether, artesunate and quinine for severe malaria
- [`nma.schwingshackl2014`](https://loukiaspin.github.io/rnmamod/reference/nma.schwingshackl2014.md)
  : Training modalities for patients with type 2 diabetes
- [`nma.stowe2011`](https://loukiaspin.github.io/rnmamod/reference/nma.stowe2011.md)
  : Antiparkinsonian interventions for later Parkinson's disease
- [`nodesplit_plot()`](https://loukiaspin.github.io/rnmamod/reference/nodesplit_plot.md)
  : End-user-ready results for the node-splitting approach
- [`plot_study_dissimilarities()`](https://loukiaspin.github.io/rnmamod/reference/plot_study_dissimilarities.md)
  : Plot Gower's disimilarity values for each study (Transitivity
  evaluation)
- [`pma.hetrick2012`](https://loukiaspin.github.io/rnmamod/reference/pma.hetrick2012.md)
  : Paroxetine versus placebo for depressive disorders
- [`pma.taylor2004`](https://loukiaspin.github.io/rnmamod/reference/pma.taylor2004.md)
  : Inositol versus glucose for depressive episode
- [`prepare_model()`](https://loukiaspin.github.io/rnmamod/reference/prepare_model.md)
  : WinBUGS code for Bayesian pairwise or network meta-analysis and
  meta-regression
- [`prepare_nodesplit()`](https://loukiaspin.github.io/rnmamod/reference/prepare_nodesplit.md)
  : WinBUGS code for the node-splitting approach
- [`prepare_ume()`](https://loukiaspin.github.io/rnmamod/reference/prepare_ume.md)
  : WinBUGS code for the unrelated mean effects model
- [`rankosucra_plot()`](https://loukiaspin.github.io/rnmamod/reference/rankosucra_plot.md)
  : Rankograms and SUCRA curves
- [`rnmamod-package`](https://loukiaspin.github.io/rnmamod/reference/rnmamod-package.md)
  [`rnmamod`](https://loukiaspin.github.io/rnmamod/reference/rnmamod-package.md)
  : rnmamod: Bayesian Network Meta-analysis with Missing Participants
- [`robustness_index()`](https://loukiaspin.github.io/rnmamod/reference/robustness_index.md)
  : Robustness index
- [`robustness_index_user()`](https://loukiaspin.github.io/rnmamod/reference/robustness_index_user.md)
  : Robustness index when 'metafor' or 'netmeta' are used
- [`run_metareg()`](https://loukiaspin.github.io/rnmamod/reference/run_metareg.md)
  : Perform Bayesian pairwise or network meta-regression
- [`run_model()`](https://loukiaspin.github.io/rnmamod/reference/run_model.md)
  : Perform Bayesian pairwise or network meta-analysis
- [`run_nodesplit()`](https://loukiaspin.github.io/rnmamod/reference/run_nodesplit.md)
  : Perform the node-splitting approach
- [`run_sensitivity()`](https://loukiaspin.github.io/rnmamod/reference/run_sensitivity.md)
  : Perform sensitivity analysis for missing participant outcome data
- [`run_series_meta()`](https://loukiaspin.github.io/rnmamod/reference/run_series_meta.md)
  : Perform a series of Bayesian pairwise meta-analyses
- [`run_ume()`](https://loukiaspin.github.io/rnmamod/reference/run_ume.md)
  : Perform the unrelated mean effects model
- [`scatterplot_sucra()`](https://loukiaspin.github.io/rnmamod/reference/scatterplot_sucra.md)
  : Scatterplot of SUCRA values
- [`scatterplots_dev()`](https://loukiaspin.github.io/rnmamod/reference/scatterplots_dev.md)
  : Deviance scatterplots
- [`series_meta_plot()`](https://loukiaspin.github.io/rnmamod/reference/series_meta_plot.md)
  : End-user-ready results for a series of pairwise meta-analyses
- [`study_perc_contrib()`](https://loukiaspin.github.io/rnmamod/reference/study_perc_contrib.md)
  : Calculate study percentage contributions to summary treatment
  effects or regression coefficients
- [`table_tau2_prior()`](https://loukiaspin.github.io/rnmamod/reference/table_tau2_prior.md)
  : Predictive distributions for the between-study variance in a future
  meta-analysis on odds ratio or standardised mean difference
- [`taylor_continuous()`](https://loukiaspin.github.io/rnmamod/reference/taylor_continuous.md)
  : Pattern-mixture model with Taylor series for continuous outcome
- [`taylor_imor()`](https://loukiaspin.github.io/rnmamod/reference/taylor_imor.md)
  : Pattern-mixture model with Taylor series for a binary outcome
- [`ume_plot()`](https://loukiaspin.github.io/rnmamod/reference/ume_plot.md)
  : End-user-ready results for the unrelated mean effects model
- [`unrelated_effects_plot()`](https://loukiaspin.github.io/rnmamod/reference/unrelated_effects_plot.md)
  : End-user-ready results for unrelated trial effects model

  meta-analysis](https://loukiaspin.github.io/rnmamod/articles/perform_network_metaanalysis.md):
